Drugs@FDA 
Includes information about drugs approved for human use in the United States:
Drug information, 
Regulatory history, 
Most recent FDA-approved Prescribing Information and patient labeling, and 
Reviews by FDA staff that evaluate the safety and effectiveness of the drug. 
Drugs@FDA does not include information about FDA-approved products regulated by the Center for Biologics Evaluation and Research (vaccines, allergenic products, blood and blood products, plasma derivatives, and cellular and gene therapy products) or products not approv
